programmes.show_description: The weekly studio show that recaps and delivers all the romantic twists, turns and favourite moments from the previous week's five nights of the main series. (HD)
The heavyweight of comedy chat, Jonathan Ross, gets up close and personal with A-list stars in this no-holds-barred talk show. (HD)

Three players are pit against a mesmerising machine. There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player. (HD)
All the latest from the world of UEFA Champions League. Featuring highlights and interviews. (HD)
Middle-distance moves and multi-event drama: 800m/1500m qualifying, hurdles, pole vault and triple jump. (HD)
Jason Manford hosts the general knowledge quiz show in which the four contestants can always give an answer - but can they give an unbeatable answer? (HD)
Live coverage of the main event and race day in Round 6 of the Formula E season. We are live in Spain with the race on the Circuito de Madrid-Jarama. (HD)
Two families are trading houses and budgets for a week. Will this social experiment make them reassess their own day-to-day lives and the value they have on money? (HD)
Megan cleans Dublin's streets the morning after the night before, Tati makes a surprise inspection to see if standards are being met and John Hurt deploys his drain robots. (HD)
Drawing on Hot Press' credibility, history and contacts, the brand new Irish Music Awards Show will capture this musical mayhem at its best! (HD)
Super Saturday: women's 60m final headlines a stacked night with men's 1500m, long jump and heptathlon climax. (HD)
In a department store of dreams, five top stylists are ready to help those in need of a style overhaul as Rylan Clark-Neal hosts. (HD)
Successful investors Emma Grede and Ashley Graham help tenacious female entrepreneurs transform their side hustles into investment-worthy main hustles - all in just 40 days. (HD)
Ireland's favourite TV critics give their assessment of the week's TV from the comfort of their own homes. (HD)
Love Island USA has returned for a seventh explosive series. It sees twelve singles arriving at a luxury villa in Fiji to spend their summer looking for love. (HD)
Scarlett Moffat leads a group of three friends in games against Sam Thompson, Chelsee Healey, Kiri Pritchard-McLean and Lianne Sanderson for some top prizes. (HD)

In a race against the clock, Ross tries to get the gang dressed and ready for a black-tie benefit at the museum. (HD)

Phoebe's half-brother visits, and they have trouble bonding. (HD)
When Janice asks the gang if any of them have ever slept together, the friends flash back to a time three years before. (HD)
